case_title: SUREKHABEN C. WALAND VS. ANTONIO CALANTAS et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-17-2010 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT CALANTAS, ANTONIO HEARING SET FOR JUN-17-2010 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ANTONIO CALANTAS' MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF MUST SERVE DEFENDANT WITH THE COMPLETE COMPLAINT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
